series_metadata.series_title: Title IV-E Juvenile Court Program (Administration Reimbursement)
series_metadata.series_description: Reports and related correspondence submitted to Bureau of Fiscal Accountability for review and reimbursement of administrative and training cost for children in custody of juvenile courts. These costs are reported on Juvenile Court Social Services Random Moment Allocation Quarterly Billing, JFS01797 form. Reports and related correspondence includes Readiness Review documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office permanently., Electronic: Permanent
